verses.arabicText: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ
verses.translationText: O you who wraps himself [in clothing],
Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -
Half of it - or subtract from it a little

verses.arabicText: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
verses.translationText: Or add to it, and recite the Qur'an with measured recitation.
Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًۭٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
verses.translationText: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًۭا طَوِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.

verses.arabicText: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

verses.arabicText: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

verses.arabicText: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًۭا جَمِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

verses.arabicText: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
verses.translationText: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.
Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire
And food that chokes and a painful punishment -

verses.arabicText: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًۭا مَّهِيلًا
verses.translationText: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًۭا شَٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًۭا
verses.translationText: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

verses.arabicText: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ أَخْذًۭا وَبِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure.

verses.arabicText: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًۭا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا
verses.translationText: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired?

verses.arabicText: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
verses.translationText: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.translationText: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.
